notes: Exclude .build/DerivedData and Jupyter scratch dirs. Generated .agent-os/* (except this file) is gitignored — see .agent/DOCUMENTATION.md §3. Session handoff uses Agent OS outputs (state/current-handoff.md, etc.); do not add a parallel .agent/HANDOFF.md — see DOCUMENTATION.md §3 Maintainer preference. If handoff still lists .build/*, delete local .build/ and run `agentos init .` from repo root.
